summary.en: All-in-one real estate marketplace that helps Latin American landlords find tenants, collect rent, and manage properties.
summary.zh: 一站式房地產市場平台，協助拉丁美洲房東尋找租客、收取租金並管理物業。

highlight.en: Houm digitizes Latin America's slow, bureaucratic rental and sales process across Chile, Mexico, and Colombia. It raised a $35M Series A led by Goodwater Capital in 2021 and reportedly reached around $60M in revenue by 2024.
highlight.zh: Houm 將拉丁美洲緩慢且繁瑣的租售流程數位化，業務橫跨智利、墨西哥與哥倫比亞。公司於 2021 年完成由 Goodwater Capital 領投的 3,500 萬美元 A 輪募資，並據報導在 2024 年達到約 6,000 萬美元營收。

funding.en: Raised $35M Series A (2021, led by Goodwater Capital); ~$60M revenue reported in 2024
funding.zh: 完成 3,500 萬美元 A 輪募資（2021 年，Goodwater Capital 領投）；2024 年據報營收約 6,000 萬美元

sources.title: Chilean proptech startup Houm raises $35M Series A to expand across LatAm | TechCrunch

summary.en: Maker of mobile battery energy storage units that replaced diesel generators on construction sites, film sets, and events.
summary.zh: 行動式電池儲能設備製造商，用於取代工地、片場與活動現場的柴油發電機。

highlight.en: Moxion was a high-profile climate-tech bet aiming to electrify last-mile power, raising over $110M including a $100M Series B with backers like Amazon and Microsoft. It filed for bankruptcy in 2024, laid off 400+ employees, and liquidated its assets.
highlight.zh: Moxion 是備受矚目的氣候科技項目，目標是電氣化最後一哩供電，募資超過 1.1 億美元，包括一輪 1 億美元 B 輪，投資方涵蓋 Amazon 與 Microsoft。公司於 2024 年申請破產，裁員逾 400 人並清算資產。

funding.en: Raised >$110M (incl. $100M Series B); went bankrupt in 2024
funding.zh: 募資逾 1.1 億美元（含 1 億美元 B 輪）；2024 年破產

sources.title: Battery startup Moxion went bankrupt. Now its founder is back to 'finish what we started.' | TechCrunch
Portable battery startup Moxion is bankrupt. What happened? | Latitude Media

summary.en: Embedded lending infrastructure that lets Latin American platforms offer capital to their SMB customers.
summary.zh: 嵌入式借貸基礎設施，讓拉丁美洲平台能向其中小企業客戶提供資金。

highlight.en: R2 powers the capital arm of platforms like Uber, Rappi, and PayU, financing tens of thousands of SMBs across Latin America. It raised a $5.9M seed led by General Catalyst plus large debt facilities including a $100M line from Community Investment Management.
highlight.zh: R2 為 Uber、Rappi 與 PayU 等平台提供資金引擎，為拉丁美洲數萬家中小企業融資。公司完成由 General Catalyst 領投的 590 萬美元種子輪，並取得大型債務額度，包括來自 Community Investment Management 的 1 億美元授信。

funding.en: Raised ~$5.9M seed (led by General Catalyst); secured $100M+ debt facilities
funding.zh: 完成約 590 萬美元種子輪（General Catalyst 領投）；取得逾 1 億美元債務額度

sources.title: LatAm Fintech R2 Raises $5.9M to Provide Capital for SMBs | Bloomberg Línea

summary.en: Cross-border financial services app offering fair, accessible banking to immigrants overlooked by traditional banks.
summary.zh: 跨境金融服務應用程式，為被傳統銀行忽略的移民提供公平、便利的銀行服務。

highlight.en: LemFi targets the underbanked diaspora moving money across borders, surpassing one million customers and over $1B in monthly transaction volume. It raised a $53M Series B led by Highland Europe in January 2025, bringing total funding to roughly $86M.
highlight.zh: LemFi 鎖定跨境匯款的金融弱勢移民群體，用戶突破一百萬，月交易量超過 10 億美元。公司於 2025 年 1 月完成由 Highland Europe 領投的 5,300 萬美元 B 輪，總募資額約達 8,600 萬美元。

funding.en: Raised $53M Series B (Jan 2025, led by Highland Europe); ~$86M total raised
funding.zh: 完成 5,300 萬美元 B 輪（2025 年 1 月，Highland Europe 領投）；總募資約 8,600 萬美元

sources.title: LemFi has secured $53M in Series B funding led by Highland Europe | Highland Europe
LemFi lands $53m Series B to tap new markets | FinTech Futures

summary.en: No-code email marketing platform that embeds interactive forms, carts, and widgets directly inside emails.
summary.zh: 無程式碼電子郵件行銷平台，可將互動表單、購物車與小工具直接嵌入郵件中。

highlight.en: Mailmodo turns static emails into app-like experiences to boost conversions, used by marketers to collect feedback, book meetings, and recover carts. The bootstrapped-style YC S21 company raised roughly $2.3M across seed rounds.
highlight.zh: Mailmodo 將靜態郵件轉化為類應用程式的互動體驗以提升轉換率，行銷人員用於收集回饋、預約會議與挽回購物車。這家 YC S21 公司在種子輪共募資約 230 萬美元。

funding.zh: 種子輪共募資約 230 萬美元

summary.en: AI-powered neobank offering data-driven debit, credit, and treasury tools to SMBs across Latin America.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的數位銀行，為拉丁美洲中小企業提供數據導向的簽帳、信貸與資金管理工具。

highlight.en: Kapital became Latin America's first AI unicorn, doubling its valuation to $1.3B after a $100M Series C in 2025 and acquiring Mexico's Intercam Bank. It serves 300,000+ clients across the US, Mexico, and Colombia with a $3B balance sheet.
highlight.zh: Kapital 成為拉丁美洲首家 AI 獨角獸，在 2025 年完成 1 億美元 C 輪並收購墨西哥 Intercam Bank 後，估值翻倍至 13 億美元。公司服務美國、墨西哥與哥倫比亞逾 30 萬客戶，資產負債表規模達 30 億美元。

funding.en: Last valued ~$1.3B; raised $100M Series C (2025, co-led by Tribe Capital and Pelion Ventures)
funding.zh: 最新估值約 13 億美元；完成 1 億美元 C 輪（2025 年，Tribe Capital 與 Pelion Ventures 共同領投）

founders: Rene Saul, Fernando Sandoval, Eder Echeverria

sources.title: Kapital achieves unicorn status with $100m Series C | FinTech Futures
Kapital Doubles Valuation to $1.3B, Becomes Latin America's First AI Unicorn | PR Newswire

summary.en: Modern e-commerce parcel delivery and last-mile logistics platform for online sellers in Pakistan.
summary.zh: 為巴基斯坦線上賣家打造的現代化電商包裹配送與最後一哩物流平台。

highlight.en: Rider modernizes Pakistani e-commerce logistics with route optimization, live tracking, and fast cash repayment, covering 60+ cities. It raised a $2.3M seed led by Global Founders Capital and moved to acquire listed courier BlueEX to become one of the country's largest players.
highlight.zh: Rider 以路線優化、即時追蹤與快速現金回款革新巴基斯坦電商物流，覆蓋逾 60 座城市。公司完成由 Global Founders Capital 領投的 230 萬美元種子輪，並收購上市快遞公司 BlueEX，躋身該國最大物流業者之一。

funding.en: Raised $2.3M seed (led by Global Founders Capital); acquired listed courier BlueEX
funding.zh: 完成 230 萬美元種子輪（Global Founders Capital 領投）；收購上市快遞公司 BlueEX

sources.title: Pakistani ecommerce logistics startup Rider raises $2.3 million seed | MENAbytes
Pakistani e-commerce logistics startup Rider looking to acquire BlueEX | Rider

summary.en: Low-code enterprise platform for building and deploying custom AI agents to automate back-office operations.
summary.zh: 低程式碼企業平台，用於建立與部署自訂 AI 代理，以自動化後勤營運。

highlight.en: Founded by MIT PhDs, StackAI let 130+ enterprises like BAE Systems and Raiffeisen Bank build AI assistants for RFPs, due diligence, and document extraction. Asana acquired the YC W23 company for roughly $75M in 2026 to anchor its AI agent layer.
highlight.zh: 由 MIT 博士創立的 StackAI 讓 BAE Systems、Raiffeisen Bank 等逾 130 家企業建立用於 RFP、盡職調查與文件擷取的 AI 助理。Asana 於 2026 年以約 7,500 萬美元收購這家 YC W23 公司，以鞏固其 AI 代理層。

funding.en: Raised ~$20M (incl. $16M Series A); acquired by Asana for ~$75M (2026)
funding.zh: 募資約 2,000 萬美元（含 1,600 萬美元 A 輪）；2026 年被 Asana 以約 7,500 萬美元收購

sources.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI | TechCrunch
Asana Acquires StackAI, Adding Cross-System Execution for Human-Agent Teams | Business Wire

summary.en: AI workspace for law firms that automates repetitive legal tasks across public sources and a firm's own data.
summary.zh: 為律師事務所打造的 AI 工作平台，整合公開資源與事務所自有資料以自動化重複性法律工作。

highlight.en: Legora is a breakout YC W24 legal-AI star battling Harvey for the lawyer-workflow market, crossing $100M ARR. A $550M Series D led by Accel (extended with Nvidia and Atlassian) valued the Stockholm-founded company at about $5.6B.
highlight.zh: Legora 是 YC W24 的法律 AI 黑馬，與 Harvey 爭奪律師工作流市場，年度經常性收入突破 1 億美元。由 Accel 領投的 5.5 億美元 D 輪（後由 Nvidia 與 Atlassian 加碼擴展）使這家發源於斯德哥爾摩的公司估值約達 56 億美元。

funding.en: Last valued ~$5.6B; raised $550M+ Series D (led by Accel; ~$866M raised total)
funding.zh: 最新估值約 56 億美元；完成逾 5.5 億美元 D 輪（Accel 領投；總募資約 8.66 億美元）

founders: Max Junestrand, Sigge Labor, August Erséus

sources.title: Swedish Legal Tech Startup Legora Triples Valuation To $5.55B With $550M Series D Led By Accel | Crunchbase News
Legal AI startup Legora hits $5.6B valuation and its battle with Harvey just got hotter | TechCrunch
